title: Rena's Tapedeck
description: Replace the jukebox with a tapedeck!
body:
![Rena's Tapedeck Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/461191def7c97e828dcc2d1e70329657811ab392.png)

# What is this pack?
Replaces the Jukebox with a Stylised Tapedeck!

## Pack Features

- Animated texture when the Tapedeck is in use!
- Renames jukebox to "tapedeck"
- Emissive textures if you're using [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

### *Languages!*
- English (All variants other than Pirate, Cat, and Upsidedown)
- Français (Both Québécois and French)
- Español (España)

### *Whats Coming Next?*
- Allowing the Tapedeck to be orientable (Unless theres a mod that allows that)
- Possible support for mods?
